import React, { useState } from 'react'; import CTA from '../components/CTA'; import './BlogPage.css'; const posts = [ { slug: 'visual-identity', title: 'How to build a visual identity that stands out', date: 'Mar 20, 2025', tag: 'Branding', readTime: '6 min read', excerpt: 'Your visual identity is more than just a logo — it\'s the complete visual language of your brand. Learn how to build a cohesive, memorable identity that resonates with your audience.', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/2pZn1ac5q54fkkThIF56Vfou8.jpg', featured: true, }, { slug: 'digital-world', title: 'How to stay relevant in a fast-changing digital world', date: 'Mar 13, 2025', tag: 'Strategy', readTime: '5 min read', excerpt: 'The digital landscape evolves at breakneck speed. Discover strategies to keep your brand fresh, relevant, and ahead of the curve no matter how the industry shifts.', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/xAmaN93UEGZxWaE2SAlY2hCRj08.jpeg', featured: false, }, { slug: 'design-trends-2025', title: 'Top design trends reshaping the industry in 2025', date: 'Mar 06, 2025', tag: 'Design', readTime: '7 min read', excerpt: 'From bold typography to immersive 3D experiences, 2025 is shaping up to be a landmark year for digital design. Here are the trends you need to watch.', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/LG47yzJKYPaE9iSMjClLZQLV0Iw.jpg', featured: false, }, { slug: 'ux-conversion', title: 'Why great UX design is your best conversion tool', date: 'Feb 27, 2025', tag: 'UI/UX', readTime: '5 min read', excerpt: 'Good design isn\'t just aesthetics — it\'s business strategy. Explore how thoughtful UX design directly impacts your conversion rates and bottom line.', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/hpK2jiBaOZYg5CRERfR8Du1A4.jpg', featured: false, }, { slug: 'motion-design', title: 'The power of motion design in modern brand storytelling', date: 'Feb 20, 2025', tag: 'Motion', readTime: '4 min read', excerpt: 'Animation and motion design have become essential tools for brands that want to engage, delight, and connect with their audiences on a deeper level.', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/rwxqhSPLCEUd9f042FJNbwEnA.jpg', featured: false, }, { slug: 'brand-consistency', title: 'The secret to maintaining brand consistency across platforms', date: 'Feb 13, 2025', tag: 'Branding', readTime: '6 min read', excerpt: 'Consistency is the cornerstone of a powerful brand. Learn the systems and processes top studios use to maintain visual coherence across every touchpoint.', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/EcEkAcDTPF28UqTHcTcvZMdY0I.jpg', featured: false, }, ]; const tags = ['All', 'Branding', 'Strategy', 'Design', 'UI/UX', 'Motion']; export default function BlogPage() { const [activeTag, setActiveTag] = useState('All'); const filtered = activeTag === 'All' ? posts : posts.filter(p => p.tag === activeTag); const featured = posts.find(p => p.featured); const rest = filtered.filter(p => !p.featured || activeTag !== 'All'); const showFeatured = activeTag === 'All'; return (
{/* Header */}

); }
